sentences.sentence: The Computer Science BS bulletin entries across years have some changes.

The most notable change is in the course CPTR 152, which was previously titled "Compu Science I" in the 2022-2023 bulletin [22-23:001993, 22-23:002753] and is now titled "Computer Science I" in the 2024-2025 bulletin [24-25:004775].
